message:
style(tests): replace assert+unwrap with idiomatic unwrap_or_else in e2e extension tests

Replace the assert!(result.is_ok()) + result.unwrap() pattern with
result.unwrap_or_else(|e| panic!(...)) in e2e_command_execute_returns_display,
e2e_command_execute_with_args, and e2e_shortcut_execute. Satisfies
clippy::unnecessary_literal_unwrap and produces cleaner error output by
formatting the error directly rather than the whole Result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
